# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/father-bot/chatgpt_telegram_bot/issues/147
# repo: father-bot/chatgpt_telegram_bot
# title: Can't build: mongo-express exited with code 0 and chatgpt_telegram_bot exited with code 1

# Last frames in traceback:
#   /usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/httpcore/backends/asyncio.py line 111 in connect_tcp
#   /usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/anyio/_core/_sockets.py line 218 in connect_tcp
#   /usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/anyio/_backends/_asyncio.py line 662 in __aexit__
#   /usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/anyio/_backends/_asyncio.py line 733 in task_done

# Minimal repro (conceptual):

def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:
    # When running
    # `docker-compose --env-file config/config.env up --build`
    # I get an infinite loop of `mongo-express exited with code 0` and `chatgpt_telegram_bot exited with code 1`
    # ```
    # chatgpt_telegram_bot    | Traceback (most recent call last):
    # chatgpt_telegram_bot    |   File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/httpcore/backends/asyncio.py", line 111, in con
    # chatgpt_telegram_bot    |     stream: anyio.abc.ByteStream = await anyio.connect_tcp(
    # chatgpt_telegram_bot    |   File "
    raise CancelledError('reproduce: see https://github.com/father-bot/chatgpt_telegram_bot/issues/147')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    repro()
